candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating result, but nothing in the excerpt ties it specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and services'; more likely a general operating/overhead item than a direct sub-line of COGS.

Separate operating amortization line above operating result, but no indication it belongs specifically to 'Materials and services'; components suggest intangible/R&D-related amortization rather than COGS.
A depreciation component line, but not clearly linked to cost of sales; absent an explicit COGS/COR label, adding to COGS would risk misallocation.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Materials and services'. The excerpt shows separate D&A rows at the operating level, but none are explicitly identified as cost-of-sales / COR / COGS related. To avoid misallocating overhead D&A into COGS, use conservative output and do not add any separate COGS D&A row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating depreciation row at the same level as the selected XSGA rows ('Employee benefit expenses', 'Other expenses', 'Development costs'), so it appears to sit outside those selected buckets and should be added separately rather than assumed embedded.

This is a component of 'Amortization' and appears to be the non-R&D amortization piece. Since 'Development costs' is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, using this component avoids re-adding R&D amortization while still capturing separate operating amortization outside the selected XSGA rows.

This is the summary amortization row, but it appears to include 'Development costs' plus 'Intangible rights'. Because 'Development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, using the full summary could distort the intended XRD subtraction logic.
Component of 'Depreciation'. Since a clean summary row 'Depreciation' exists, this component should not be chosen separately to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Employee benefit expenses' + 'Other expenses' + 'Development costs'. Separate operating D&A rows are shown alongside those buckets, so they should not be assumed embedded. For depreciation, use the summary row 'Depreciation' rather than its components. For amortization, avoid the summary row 'Amortization' because it appears to include 'Development costs', and that row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD; instead use only the non-R&D component 'Intangible rights'.
